metadata.title: Design Monkey — Style DNA for AI UI
metadata.description: Bring your own reference image. Design Monkey extracts the style DNA and injects it into your IDE via MCP, so AI-generated UI looks consistent and less AI-ish.

hero.title: Turn reference designs into reusable
hero.lead: Bring your own reference image. Design Monkey extracts the style DNA and injects it into your IDE via MCP, so AI-generated UI looks consistent and less "AI-ish" with far fewer prompt iterations.
hero.ctaPrimary: Apply to be a seed user
hero.bestFitDesc: Developers building real pages in the next 7 days.
hero.zeroDesignDesc: Pick a good reference and let the style DNA do the rest.

evidence.title: Before / After
evidence.subtitle: Same requirement. Left: no style injection. Right: with Design Monkey.

demo.title: 15-second workflow demo
demo.subtitle: Reference → extraction → IDE generation, in one smooth pass.
demo.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps from inspiration to production-quality UI.
steps.step1Desc: Pick a single UI image with consistent style and common components.
steps.step2Desc: We derive color, typography, radii, shadow, spacing, and component vibe.
steps.step3Desc: Connect MCP and let AI-generated UI match the reference by default.

effort.title: What you'll need
effort.subtitle: Set expectations clearly for a smooth first run.
referenceItems: 1 clear image with consistent visual style.
Include buttons, forms, and cards if possible.
A second reference may be needed if style is unstable.
timeItems: Try it on a real page within 7 days.
Share feedback so we can improve the extractor.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Short answers for seed users who are ready to build.

items.question: Do I need design skills?
items.answer: No. Picking a good reference is enough.

items.question: What makes a good reference image?
items.answer: A clear image with consistent visual style. Including buttons, forms, and cards helps.

items.question: Which IDEs are supported?
items.answer: Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and mainstream IDEs.

items.question: I don't have a real page to build right now. Should I apply?
items.answer: Probably not. We prioritize applicants who can try it on a real task within 7 days.

applySection.title: Apply to be a seed user
applySection.subtitle: Selection is based on a real use case, reference quality, and willingness to give feedback.

footer.tagline: Design Monkey · Style DNA for AI-generated UI
